name: the preserved tubers
identity: A rare and valuable item used in the Quiet Weave's practices, known for its ability to store and maintain the energetic properties of the land.
current_status: Being presented by the player character to Chief Thorne as part of a gift to ensure the tribe passes the winter without starvation, alongside dried meat and fermented stores.

volatile_state.current_activity: being offered to Chief Thorne to ensure the tribe passes the winter without starvation
